title: salvia mellifera subsp. jonesii
intro: Salvia mellifera subsp. jonesii, also known as Jones' sage, is a subspecies of the Salvia mellifera plant, a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Salvia mellifera subsp. jonesii include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Salvia mellifera subsp. jonesii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
